sections.paragraph:
& שְׁמֻעָה prop. that which is heard; hence-

(1) a message, tidings, 1Sa 4:19 whether joyful, Pro 15:30 25:25 or sorrowful, Jer 49:23 Psa 112:7 Jer 10:22 especially a message sent from God, Isa 53:1 Jer 49:14 hence-

(2) i.q. instruction, teaching, doctrine, Isa 28:9.

(3) rumour, 2Ch 9:6.
